name: Base
description: The base role with no explicit right but dashboard and browser cache cleaner access.

name: Data entry
description: A role for users who can enter data via tracker capture

name: Metadata export
description: Gets the right to export metadata

name: NeoIPC Admin
description: NeoIPC reporting administration: Reference Report live generation plus reference-data and validation-exception management in the NeoIPC reporting app.

name: Nothing
description: A role that does not and will never have any explicit rights, so that it can only access publicly visible objects.
